code:
import io
import string

type Color =
  | Red
  | Green
  | Yellow

fn advance(_ c: Color) -> Color
  match c
  when Red
    Color.Green
  when Green
    Color.Yellow
  when Yellow
    Color.Red
  end
end

fn name(_ c: Color) -> String
  match c
  when Red
    "Red"
  when Green
    "Green"
  when Yellow
    "Yellow"
  end
end

mut state = Color.Red

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
for tok in tokens
  if tok == "next"
    state = advance(state)
  end
end

println(name(state))
